title: Custom Nodes
subtitle: Reusable, PowerShell-backed activities that appear in the designer palette.
empty: No custom nodes yet. Create one to add a reusable activity to the palette.
noMatch: No custom nodes match your search.
lockedHint: This node is live (enabled). Only an administrator can edit it — ask an admin to disable it first.
deleteConfirm: Delete custom node "{{name}}"? Existing workflows that use it will fail until updated.

fields.name: Name
fields.keyHint: Stable slug used in the activity type. Letters, digits, _ and - (max 64). Cannot be changed later.
fields.scriptHint: Declared inputs are injected as $variables. Publish declared outputs by setting same-named $variables in the script. Use {{globals.NAME}} for secrets - never hard-code them.

conflictReload: Someone else changed this node. Reload and re-apply your changes.
importInvalidJson: File "{{file}}" is not valid custom-node export JSON.
importDone: Imported {{count}} custom node(s) (disabled — review and enable).

versions.empty: No previous versions yet — snapshots are created when changes are saved.

rollbackConfirm: Roll back "{{name}}" to version {{version}}? The current state is snapshotted as a new version first.
